name: Hanging Straight Leg Raise
shortDescription: A core exercise performed while hanging, lifting straight legs to target the abdominals and hip flexors.
instructions: Hang from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, keeping your body steady. Contract your core and raise your legs, keeping them straight, until they're parallel to the ground or higher. Lower your legs with control and repeat.
steps: Hang from a pull-up bar with arms fully extended.
Engage core and lift legs up to parallel or higher.
Lower legs under control to starting position.
breathing: Exhale as you lift legs, inhale as you lower.
